sourcesContent:
import { Link, useParams } from "react-router-dom"; import Shell, { MemberDot } from "../components/Shell"; import { getGroups, GROUP_DETAILS, fmt } from "../data/store"; export default function SplitSummary() { const { id } = useParams(); const groups = getGroups(); const group = groups.find((g) => g.id === id) || groups[0]; const details = GROUP_DETAILS[id] || { settlements: [] }; const total = details.settlements.reduce((a, s) => a + s.amount, 0); return (
Groups › {group.name} › Split Summary

Split Summary

Detailed breakdown of debts and settlements.

Simplify Payments
{details.settlements.length === 0 && (
All settled! 🎉
)} {details.settlements.map((s, i) => (
→
{s.to} gets {fmt(s.amount)} from {s.from}
Tap to settle this transaction
))}
TOTAL PENDING
{fmt(total)}
Across {details.settlements.length} settlements in {group.name}

Spending Categories

✈️ Travel64%
🍽️ Food & Drink22%
🎒 Leisure14%
 ); }
